response.justification: Bogdan has deep full-stack engineering experience and entrepreneurial initiative with open-source AI-agent tooling and GIS platforms, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy expertise, or director-level impact required for this role; his startup-like contributions are impressive but not scaled or monetized in a cloud/AI context.
strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience across languages and domains
Proven entrepreneurial initiative with open-source AI-agent and GIS platforms
Strong technical communication and knowledge-sharing through workshops and talks
concerns: No clear demonstration of AI/ML product development or cloud platform strategy experience
Lacks evidence of director-level influence or cross-team strategic leadership
Minimal mention of cloud technologies (AWS/GCP/Azure) beyond CDK usage
